H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: n=95, mean=7.15 (σ=1.78), pct_pos=66%, strong confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, high music satisfaction. YouTube: 30 views (highest in HEALING). AutoGluon predicts overstim score 6.86, slightly below observed.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Most people with overstimulation felt noticeably better after about 10 minutes, and it's reaching more people online.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: n=51, mean=6.92 (σ=1.73), pct_pos=65%, strong confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, mixed music opinion. No YouTube data. AutoGluon prediction aligns near 6.86.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Generally effective for overstimulation, though a clear minority found the music unappealing.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: n=47, mean=7.04 (σ=1.68), pct_pos=64%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, balanced rhythm. AutoGluon prediction matches ~6.86.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Good results for most with overstimulation, particularly effective after the initial settling phase.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: n=67, mean=7.22 (σ=1.93), pct_pos=63%, strong confidence. Qualitative: moderate-to-significant improvement, settle 5-10 min, high music approval. YouTube: 7 views, no retention data. AutoGluon predicts higher anxiety score(7.84). Bimodal distribution at scores 14-15 suggests population heterogeneity.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Most listeners felt calmer within 5-10 minutes and appreciated the music, but few people have discovered it online.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: n=48, mean=6.94 (σ=1.62), pct_pos=67%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, settle ~5 min, mixed music opinion. No YouTube data. AutoGluon prediction aligns at 7.84.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: Listeners typically noticed reduced anxiety within 5 minutes, though some had neutral experiences with the music.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: n=36, mean=7.08 (σ=1.89), pct_pos=61%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, settle ~10 min. AutoGluon prediction also 7.84.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Good anxiety reduction observed for most, with settling typically around 10 minutes.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: n=43, mean=6.35 (σ=1.70), pct_pos=53%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: significant improvement, rapid settling (~5 min). YouTube: 6 views. AutoGluon predicts higher crisis score(7.96).
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Crisis listeners reported significant improvement within about 5 minutes, but scores suggest protocol may need refinement.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: n=33, mean=6.52 (σ=1.70), pct_pos=55%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: moderate-significant improvement, mixed music opinion. YouTube: 4 views. AutoGluon prediction is 7.96.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Those in acute distress experienced moderate to significant relief within 5-10 minutes.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: n=27, mean=6.52 (σ=1.91), pct_pos=52%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: very rapid settling (<1 min), mixed music opinion. YouTube: 5 views. AutoGluon prediction is 7.96.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Quick settling occurred within minutes, though half of listeners had mixed experiences with the music.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: n=54, mean=7.19 (σ=1.86), pct_pos=65%, strong confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, rapid settling (<5 min). No YouTube data. AutoGluon predicts sleep score(7.54).
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Sleep protocol shows strong results - most listeners settled quickly and reported noticeable improvement.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: n=45, mean=7.09 (σ=1.55), pct_pos=67%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: moderate improvement, neutral music feedback. AutoGluon prediction aligns at 7.54.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Consistent sleep benefits observed, though some listeners found the music only moderately appealing.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: n=28, mean=7.07 (σ=1.68), pct_pos=64%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, settle ~5-10 min. AutoGluon predicts 7.54.
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Good sleep protocol performance confirmed - solid descent pattern solid for most listeners.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: n=41, mean=6.46 (σ=1.82), pct_pos=56%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, mixed rhythm comfort. No YouTube data. AutoGluon predicts T-FC-L3 better for focus.
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Focus improvements were noticeable but more variable than expected.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: n=32, mean=7.19 (σ=1.60), pct_pos=66%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: moderate-to-significant improvement, settle ~10 min. YouTube:4 views. AutoGluon predicts focus score 7.73.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Solid focus benefits with moderate to significant improvements reported by most listeners.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: n=35, mean=7.63 (σ=1.97), pct_pos=71%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: significant improvement, high music satisfaction. YouTube:15 views (highest in THRIVING). AutoGluon predicts focus score 7.73, matching observed.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Highest focus scores observed here, with many listeners reporting significant improvements.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: n=34, mean=6.74 (σ=1.73), pct_pos=53%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: slight-to-moderate improvement, quick settling for many. No YouTube data. AutoGluon suggests T-FC-L3 is better for focus.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Creative flow improvements were modest for most listeners, though some experienced significant benefits.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: n=24, mean=6.79 (σ=1.41), pct_pos=58%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: significant improvement, high music liking. No YouTube data. No specific AutoGluon prediction.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Half of listeners experienced creative enhancement, often with strong appreciation for the music.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=7.28 (σ=1.32), pct_pos=67%, developing confidence. Qualitative: noticeable-to-significant improvement, settle ~10 min. YouTube:7 views. AutoGluon suggests this may belong to low-affect zone (X-ME-L1).
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: This small group reported high creative impacts - results may be promising as more data comes in.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: n=25, mean=7.04 (σ=1.34), pct_pos=64%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: moderate-to-significant improvement, longer settle times (~20 min). No YouTube data. No direct AutoGluon prediction.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Very consistent maintenance results observed - suggests this protocol may be reaching its efficacy limit.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: n=22, mean=6.68 (σ=2.03), pct_pos=59%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: moderate improvement, varied music opinion. No YouTube data. AutoGluon predicts maintenance score 7.69.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Slightly more variable balance outcomes than expected, though moderate improvements for most.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: n=14, mean=6.93 (σ=1.73), pct_pos=71%, developing confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement but some didn't settle. No YouTube data. AutoGluon prediction aligns at 7.69.
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Promising maintenance pattern with this small group - monitor as response grows.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: n=39, mean=6.74 (σ=1.94), pct_pos=54%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: moderate-to-significant improvement, settle ~10-20 min. YouTube:8 views. AutoGluon predicts low-affect score 8.23.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Mood and energy improvements observed consistently after about 10 minutes.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: n=25, mean=6.76 (σ=1.71), pct_pos=64%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: significant improvement, high music liking. YouTube:8 views. AutoGluon prediction is 8.23.
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Good mood and energy pattern confirmed after entrainment.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=6.28 (σ=1.74), pct_pos=56%, developing confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement but also no-effect reports. YouTube:4 views. AutoGluon predicts low-affect score 8.23.
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Some listeners feel more energized, but protocol needs refinement to work more consistently.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: n=22, mean=6.36 (σ=2.01), pct_pos=45%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: noticeable-to-significant improvement, quick settling. YouTube:5 views. AutoGluon predicts motivation score 7.88.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Moderate motivation results with clear mid-protocol variations.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: n=14, mean=6.21 (σ=1.63), pct_pos=43%, developing confidence. Qualitative: modest improvement, varied activity contexts. YouTube:7 views. Performance lowest among Motivation protocols.
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Lowest motivation results in this category - suggests audience mismatch.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: n=13, mean=7.15 (σ=2.38), pct_pos=62%, developing confidence. Qualitative: moderate improvement. YouTube:7 views. High drift (sim=0.507); outlier potential despite small n.
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Highest motivation scores here despite small group - suggests outlier potential.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: n=24, mean=6.75 (σ=1.62), pct_pos=54%, meaningful confidence. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, strong music liking. YouTube:8 views. AutoGluon predicts mind-clarity score 7.54.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Mind clarity benefits were noticeable, with strong music approval from listeners.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: n=16, mean=6.81 (σ=1.64), pct_pos=56%, developing confidence. Qualitative: significant improvement, rapid settling. YouTube:12 views. AutoGluon predicts mind-clarity score 7.54.
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Expected mind clarity patterns observed but sample size still developing.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: n=10, mean=5.70 (σ=2.45), pct_pos=50%, developing confidence. Qualitative: mixed improvement reports, varied music/opinion. YouTube:8 views. High σ suggests subgroup effect.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Mixed mind clarity results - some listeners benefited significantly while others didn't.

sphere_commentary.overview:
The dataset reveals modestly positive outcomes across series with distinct variance patterns.
• HEALING leads with highest mean (6.98) and lowest spread (σ≈1.8).
• THRIVING matches mean (6.96) but shows wider variance.
• TRANSFORMING trails (mean 6.59) with greatest spread (σ≈1.9), consistent with design.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Outcome patterns align with design intents.
• DESCENT protocols (HEALING) cluster near mean 7.0 with consistent positive ratings.
• HOLD protocols (THRIVING) show broader range; focus protocols reach highest observed means (≈7.6).
• ASCENT protocols (TRANSFORMING) show lower means (≈6.2-7.1) and higher variability, matching expectations.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Several protocols deviate from expected patterns.
• X-MC-L3 shows bimodal distribution with mean 5.70 (σ 2.45), 50% positive — probable subgroup effect.
• H-CR-L1 has lower mean 6.35 than expected for crisis protocol, despite rapid settlement.
• Low YouTube views across protocols (<10) despite high outcome scores hint at undiscovered potential.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
[CONVERGENT SIGNAL] H-AX-L1 (n=67) — increase platform promotion (only 7 YouTube views).
[CONVERGENT SIGNAL] X-MC-L3 (n=10) — redesign frequency envelope due to polarization.
[CONVERGENT SIGNAL] T-FC-L3 (n=35) — create L2 variant to extend reach.
[CONVERGENT SIGNAL] X-MD-L1 (n=22) — adjust ascent pacing or add hold segment.
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding drift highlights evolving interpretations.
• CROSS-RUN DRIFT: 26 protocols show similarity <0.80, notably X-MD-L3 (0.507) and TRANSFORMING series.
• CROSS-PROTOCOL SEMANTIC CLUSTERS: insufficient data for clustering.
• Confidence: Drift signals are reliable; clusters need more data.
